+# Execution Report
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-234
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-27_18-47-54+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- `.gitattributes` — added LF-normalization rules for `*.rge-project`, `*.rge-scene`, `*.rge-prefab`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_prefab.rge-prefab` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_project.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_scene.rge-scene` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/v0.0_to_v0.1_migration_input.rge-scene` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/cad-parametric/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/material-zoo/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/physics-puzzle/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/skinned-character/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+- `golden-projects/stress-world/.rge-project` — checkout renormalized to LF (no content change)
+STATUS: AWAITING_REVIEW
+
+## Task Packet Reference
+
+`ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_TASK_2026-05-27_18-31-08+0300.md`
+
+## Pre-Execution Review Consumed
+
+No pre-execution review issued for this dispatch.
+
+## What I Changed
+
+### Source
+
+- `.gitattributes`: appended three rules pinning RGE text data formats to LF on
+  checkout and commit:
+    - `*.rge-project text eol=lf`
+    - `*.rge-scene text eol=lf`
+    - `*.rge-prefab text eol=lf`
+  The existing `*.rs / *.toml / *.lock` rules were not touched.
+
+### Tests
+
+- None added. This dispatch was a line-ending policy fix only; per the Task
+  Packet `### MUST NOT add new files` rule, no new tests were authored. The
+  existing `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip` suite (9 tests) was used
+  as the acceptance test and now passes from a freshly normalized checkout.
+
+### Docs
+
+- None added. Per scope, no new docs were authored.
+
+### Fixture checkout normalization
+
+In addition to the `.gitattributes` policy change, the working-tree copies of
+the tracked RGE fixture/project files were physically converted from CRLF to LF
+so that `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip` (whose `include_str!`
+embeds the bytes verbatim) does not depend on stale Cargo target-cache state
+or on `core.autocrlf`. The index entries were already LF — only the
+working-tree EOL changed — so this is a checkout-only normalization with no
+index or semantic-content change.
+
+Procedure used (repo-safe, per Planner Notes):
+
+1. Added the three `*.rge-*` rules to `.gitattributes`.
+2. Ran `git add --renormalize` over the eleven affected RGE paths to attach the
+   new `text eol=lf` attribute (no index change resulted, since the index
+   blobs were already LF).
+3. Verified `git ls-files --eol` then showed `i/lf  w/crlf  attr/text eol=lf`
+   for the targeted files — i.e. the policy was attached but the working-tree
+   copies still needed to be re-materialized.
+4. Deleted the eleven working-tree files and `git checkout HEAD --` restored
+   them honoring the new `eol=lf` attribute, producing `i/lf  w/lf`.
+
+The eleven affected paths:
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_prefab.rge-prefab`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_project.rge-project`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_scene.rge-scene`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/v0.0_to_v0.1_migration_input.rge-scene`
+- `golden-projects/cad-parametric/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/material-zoo/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/physics-puzzle/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`
+- `golden-projects/skinned-character/.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/stress-world/.rge-project`
+
+No `*.rge-prefab` files exist under `golden-projects/**`, so the new
+`*.rge-prefab` rule has no `golden-projects` files to normalize today; the rule
+is in place for future fixtures.
+
+## Per-File Summary
+
+`.gitattributes` is the only tracked file with an actual content diff
+(`git diff .gitattributes` shows three appended lines and nothing else). The
+eleven RGE fixture/project files have identical index hashes before and after
+this dispatch — only their working-tree byte representation changed (CRLF → LF)
+so that `include_str!`-driven byte-identical round-trip tests see the same
+bytes regardless of `core.autocrlf` history.
+
+## Verification Results
+
+All gates listed in the Task Packet's `## Verification Gates` section were
+run from the renormalized worktree.
+
+- `git diff --check` → exit 0 (clean; no whitespace errors)
+- `git ls-files --eol crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` →
+  all six matching tracked RGE files report `i/lf  w/lf  attr/text eol=lf`:
+    - `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_prefab.rge-prefab`
+    - `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_project.rge-project`
+    - `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/sample_scene.rge-scene`
+    - `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/v0.0_to_v0.1_migration_input.rge-scene`
+    - `golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project`
+    - `golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene`
+  (The other five `golden-projects/*/.rge-project` files were also verified
+  individually and likewise show `i/lf  w/lf  attr/text eol=lf`.)
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip --no-fail-fast` → 9 passed / 0 failed / 0 ignored
+  (incl. `project_fixture_round_trips_byte_identical`,
+  `prefab_fixture_round_trips_byte_identical`,
+  `scene_fixture_round_trips_byte_identical`,
+  `canonical_project_matches_fixture`,
+  `canonical_prefab_matches_fixture`,
+  `canonical_scene_matches_fixture`).
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1` → `VERIFY OK: all 7 verification step(s) passed.`
+  (cargo +nightly fmt --check; architecture lints; architecture-lint test
+  suite; cargo deny check; cargo test --workspace --all-targets; cargo test
+  --workspace --doc; cargo bench -p rge-script-bench --no-run.)
+
+## Deviations from Task Packet
+
+None — execution stayed strictly within the Task Packet scope. Only
+`.gitattributes` and the eleven enumerated RGE fixture/project paths were
+touched, the policy rules match the exact wording in `## Deliverables` item 1,
+no Rust source / Cargo metadata / CI / dispatch scripts / tests / docs were
+modified, and no new files were added outside `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_*`.
+
+## Open Questions for Reviewer
+
+- Worth a glance: the `*.rge-prefab text eol=lf` rule is in place but has no
+  `golden-projects/**` file to normalize today (only the `crates/rge-data`
+  fixture exists). Confirm that pinning it ahead of the first golden prefab is
+  the intended outcome (the Task Packet's RELATED_FILES list anticipates
+  `golden-projects/**/*.rge-prefab`).
+- Confirm that the EOL-only physical-checkout fix (no index change for the
+  eleven fixture/project files; only `.gitattributes` carries an index diff)
+  is the right shape for the PR. The Planner Notes asked for a "narrow
+  git-attributes normalization change … so the final diff shows policy plus
+  line-ending normalization only," and the diff here is exactly the three
+  appended attribute lines plus zero index-level fixture changes, which I
+  read as a clean match for that intent.
+
+## Worktree State
+
+- Tracked files: only `.gitattributes` is modified-but-uncommitted (per
+  `git status --short`).
+- Untracked items:
+    - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_TASK_2026-05-27_18-31-08+0300.md`
+    - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_TASK_2026-05-27_18-31-08+0300.meta.json`
+    - `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_EXEC_2026-05-27_18-47-54+0300.md` (this packet)
+- Branch: `ai-dispatch/ISSUE-234`
+- Last commit: `5e0460b` fix(dispatch): keep worktree path resolver provider-free
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-234
+AUTHOR: Executor / Claude
+NEXT_ROLE: REVIEWER_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---

@@ -0,0 +1,115 @@
+# Task Packet
+
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-234
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+TIMESTAMP: 2026-05-27_18-31-08+0300
+RELATED_FILES:
+- .gitattributes
+- crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-project
+- crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-scene
+- crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-prefab
+- golden-projects/**/*.rge-project
+- golden-projects/**/*.rge-scene
+- golden-projects/**/*.rge-prefab
+- ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_*
+- ai_dispatch_logs/log_*ISSUE-234*
+STATUS: OPEN
+
+## Goal
+
+Make RGE data fixture and project file line endings deterministic on Windows checkouts so `rge-data` byte-identical round-trip tests and `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` do not depend on stale Cargo target-cache state or local `core.autocrlf` behavior.
+
+## Context
+
+ISSUE-233 blocked after scoped physics tests passed because the canonical workspace gate failed in `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip`: `include_str!` embedded CRLF fixture bytes from a Windows checkout while the canonical RON serializer emits LF. These files are source data formats with byte-identical tests, so their line endings must be pinned in git attributes and normalized in the checkout.
+
+## Scope
+
+### MAY edit
+- `.gitattributes`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-project`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-scene`
+- `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.rge-prefab`
+- `golden-projects/**/*.rge-project`
+- `golden-projects/**/*.rge-scene`
+- `golden-projects/**/*.rge-prefab`
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_*`
+- `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*ISSUE-234*`
+
+### MAY add new files
+- `ai_handoffs/ISSUE-234_*`
+- `ai_dispatch_logs/log_*ISSUE-234*`
+
+### MUST NOT edit
+- Rust source files
+- Cargo manifests or lockfiles
+- `.github/**`
+- `.ai/dispatch.tasks.md`
+- `Invoke-AiDispatch*.ps1`
+- `tools/**`
+- Any non-RGE-format fixture outside the `### MAY edit` list
+
+### MUST NOT add new files
+- New tests
+- New scripts
+- New docs
+- New source files
+- Any file outside the `### MAY add new files` list
+
+## Deliverables
+
+1. Add `.gitattributes` rules that pin RGE text data formats to LF on checkout and commit:
+   - `*.rge-project text eol=lf`
+   - `*.rge-scene text eol=lf`
+   - `*.rge-prefab text eol=lf`
+2. Ensure the affected RGE fixture/project files in this checkout are physically LF before running tests. Use repo-safe normalization such as `git add --renormalize` plus rewriting or re-checking files as needed; do not alter semantic content.
+3. Verify `git ls-files --eol` reports `w/lf` for the tracked `crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures/*.{rge-project,rge-scene,rge-prefab}` files and `golden-projects/simple-scene` RGE files.
+4. Do not change Rust source. This is a line-ending policy fix only.
+
+## Acceptance Criteria
+
+- `.gitattributes` contains the three required RGE-format rules exactly: `*.rge-project text eol=lf`, `*.rge-scene text eol=lf`, and `*.rge-prefab text eol=lf`.
+- The tracked RGE fixture/project files covered by this dispatch are normalized without semantic content changes.
+- `git ls-files --eol` confirms the relevant tracked RGE fixture/project files have `w/lf` and an LF eol attribute.
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip --no-fail-fast` passes from the current checkout without relying on stale target-cache state.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` passes, or the Executor halts under the halt conditions below.
+- Publish mode is `pr`; do not merge to `main` directly.
+
+## Constraints / Non-Goals
+
+- This dispatch is limited to line-ending policy and fixture checkout normalization.
+- Do not change Rust source, test logic, serializers, parsers, schemas, Cargo metadata, CI configuration, dispatch automation scripts, or unrelated fixtures.
+- Do not add tests, scripts, docs, source files, or new fixture types.
+- Do not change RGE fixture semantic content; only line endings may change.
+
+## Verification Gates
+
+The Executor MUST run and document the result of each of these in their `EXECUTION_REPORT`:
+
+- `git diff --check`
+- `git ls-files --eol crates/rge-data/tests/fixtures golden-projects/simple-scene/.rge-project golden-projects/simple-scene/scenes/main.rge-scene` and confirm relevant RGE data files show `w/lf` with an LF eol attribute.
+- `cargo test -p rge-data --test round_trip --no-fail-fast`
+- `.\.ai\dispatch.verify.ps1`
+
+## Halt Conditions
+
+The Executor MUST halt without committing and request fresh guidance if any of the following occur:
+
+- Fixing the test requires changing `crates/rge-data` Rust source.
+- Fixing the test requires changing fixture semantic content rather than line endings.
+- `.ai/dispatch.verify.ps1` still fails after LF normalization for any reason other than an unrelated pre-existing failure that is independently reproduced on clean `main`.
+- The required `.gitattributes` policy cannot be applied without editing files outside the `### MAY edit` scope.
+
+## Planner Notes
+
+The expected fix is a narrow git-attributes normalization change. Prefer `git add --renormalize` scoped to the allowed RGE-format paths, followed by explicit `git ls-files --eol` inspection, so the final diff shows policy plus line-ending normalization only.
+
+---
+
+HANDOFF_STATUS: COMPLETE
+DISPATCH_ID: ISSUE-234
+AUTHOR: Planner / OpenAI Codex
+NEXT_ROLE: EXECUTOR_AI
+EXIT_CODE: 0
+
+---
